progress.searching: Searching for MA Touch thermostats… This continues automatically and advances as soon as one appears. Make sure your thermostats are powered and within range of a Bluetooth proxy.

pick.title: Add Mitsubishi MA Touch thermostats
pick.description: Select the thermostats to add. They are discovered automatically by their CT01MA name via your Bluetooth proxies.

retry.title: No thermostats found yet
retry.description: No MA Touch thermostats are visible yet. Make sure they are powered and within range of a Bluetooth proxy, then submit to search again.

device.title: Configure thermostat
device.description: Set a name and the PIN for {device}. Find the PIN on the thermostat under Settings → Bluetooth (enable Bluetooth in the admin settings first; default code 0000).

abort.no_devices_found: No MA Touch thermostats found nearby. Make sure they are powered and within range of a Bluetooth proxy, then try again.

user.title: Add thermostat
user.description: Select a thermostat and set its name and PIN. If none are listed yet, submit to search again.

error.no_devices_found: No new MA Touch thermostats are visible yet. Make sure they are powered and within range of a Bluetooth proxy, then submit to search again.

data.log_polls: Log every poll to the telemetry file (verbose)
